---
title: ""
image: files/Ari_Erol_ID.png
about: 
  template: jolla
  image-shape: round
  image-width: 14rem
  
  id: ppc2
  
---
::: {#ppc2}
I am happily married to <a href="https://fatiherolphd.com" target="_blank"> Fatih Erol</a> who is a Postdoctoral Research Fellow in Political Psychology at <a href="https://www.uidaho.edu/" target="_blank"> the University of Idaho</a>. His primary research agenda covers comparative political behavior, political psychology, causal inference, and measurement. 

If I happen to have sparse time, I enjoy water coloring and knitting.
:::
